critical_gates.name: Sitemap exists
critical_gates.evidence: robots.txt references https://zuvo.dev/sitemap-index.xml; sitemap-index.xml and sitemap-0.xml both return 200 XML.

critical_gates.name: Googlebot not blocked
critical_gates.evidence: robots.txt does not block Googlebot; live Googlebot user-agent request returned 200.

critical_gates.name: HTTPS active
critical_gates.evidence: https://zuvo.dev/ returns HTTP/2 200 with HSTS preload enabled.

critical_gates.name: Canonical tags present
critical_gates.evidence: Canonical tags are present on homepage and sampled skill pages; consistency is tracked separately.

critical_gates.name: JSON-LD server-side rendered
critical_gates.evidence: Homepage and skill-page JSON-LD blocks are present in the initial HTML response.

critical_gates.name: AI crawler policy conscious
critical_gates.evidence: robots.txt contains explicit Cloudflare Managed Content bot directives and Content-Signal declarations.

strengths.title: JSON-LD is SSR on sampled pages
strengths.evidence: Homepage and /en/skills/seo-audit/ raw HTML both include JSON-LD script tags.

strengths.title: Technical headers are strong
strengths.evidence: Live responses include HSTS preload, CSP, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, and X-Content-Type-Options.

strengths.title: Homepage performance is excellent in lab trace
strengths.evidence: Chrome trace measured LCP 293 ms and CLS 0.00 on https://zuvo.dev/.

findings.confidence_reason: 11 of 12 sampled sitemap URLs emitted homepage canonical and og:url values instead of self URLs.
findings.evidence: https://zuvo.dev/en/skills/seo-audit/ raw HTML uses canonical=https://zuvo.dev/ and og:url=https://zuvo.dev/.

findings.confidence_reason: llms.txt content conflicts with current live-site facts and install flow.
findings.evidence: https://zuvo.dev/llms.txt says 33 skills and outdated install commands while the live site states 39 skills.

findings.confidence_reason: The route exists but serves homepage HTML with text/html content-type.
findings.evidence: HEAD https://zuvo.dev/llms-full.txt -> 200 text/html; body matches homepage HTML.

findings.confidence_reason: The live sitemap contains loc entries only; no lastmod tags were observed.
The DOM on sampled skill pages has nav anchors whose targets do not exist.
findings.evidence: On /en/skills/seo-audit/, #pipeline, #gates, and #comparison are linked in nav but missing from the page DOM.

findings.confidence_reason: Primary navigation is reused consistently, but several links are homepage-only on detail routes.
findings.evidence: Skill detail nav links to homepage section anchors instead of page-valid destinations.
Sampled title lengths include 73, 68, 77, 75, and 78 characters across skill pages.

findings.confidence_reason: Description lengths are inconsistent across sampled routes.
findings.evidence: Homepage meta description length is 175; /en/skills/audits/ is 77.

findings.confidence_reason: Skill detail pages emit generic site/application schema, with page intent covered only indirectly by breadcrumb and FAQ markup.
findings.evidence: https://zuvo.dev/en/skills/seo-audit/ includes SoftwareApplication, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, and FAQPage JSON-LD only.

findings.confidence_reason: Sampled skill-page schema lacks author and published/updated fields.
findings.evidence: /en/skills/seo-audit/ JSON-LD omits author, datePublished, and dateModified; visible freshness is limited to 'last synced'.

findings.confidence_reason: Cloudflare Managed Content is active and at least one generic non-browser UA was rejected.
findings.evidence: python-urllib/3.12 returned 403 while canonical sampled bot UAs returned 200.

findings.confidence_reason: No client-visible error monitoring integration was seen in source or requests.
findings.evidence: Homepage network requests included only first-party assets plus Cloudflare Insights.

bot_matrix.evidence: robots.txt disallows GPTBot; live GET returned 200 HTML.
robots.txt disallows ClaudeBot; live GET returned 200 HTML.
robots.txt disallows Google-Extended; live GET returned 200 HTML.
Wildcard allow in robots plus live GET 200.
Wildcard allow in robots plus live GET 200.
Wildcard allow in robots plus live GET 200.
Wildcard allow in robots plus live GET 200.

render_diff.evidence: Raw source and rendered DOM matched on homepage.
Raw source and rendered DOM matched on /en/skills/seo-audit/, but both were incorrect for the route.
Raw source and rendered DOM matched on /en/skills/seo-audit/, but both were incorrect for the route.

manual_checks: Verify Search Console and Bing Webmaster ownership for the production domain.
Review Cloudflare bot settings to ensure edge behavior matches the intended crawler policy.
Verify preview/staging environments emit noindex protections.
Collect field INP data via CrUX or first-party RUM.
